since_last: 64% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.81%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +1.12% · Gold +1.21% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 64% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.81%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.81%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: EQIX is the standout at -8.60%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +4.07%, MU +3.73%, INTC +3.45%, ARM +3.02%, LRCX +2.93%. Laggards: EQIX -8.60%, CRM -1.00%, BIDU -0.70%, NOW -0.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.38% at $150.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
